message:
test(brenner-loop): add comprehensive tests for graveyard and hypothesis-history

- Add graveyard.test.ts (29 tests) covering:
  - Death type validation and labels
  - Brenner falsification quotes
  - ID generation and validation
  - FalsifiedHypothesis creation, mutations, and validation
  - Graveyard stats and failure pattern analysis
  - Display helpers (date formatting, summarization)

- Add hypothesis-history.test.ts (31 tests) covering:
  - History store creation
  - Evolution triggers and labels
  - Root hypothesis addition
  - Hypothesis evolution and abandonment
  - Navigation (ancestors, descendants, root, leaves)
  - Common ancestor finding
  - Hypothesis diff computation
  - Evolution graph generation
  - Evolution stats
  - Time range and trigger queries
  - Ancestor relationship checking

All 3,647 tests pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
